scope: AgenC rollout JSONL recorder, session index, retention, listing, and trace bundles mapped from the donor rollout crates.
_sourceRootBrandingAllow: branding-scan: allow donor source root path

requiredBehaviors: writes one schema-stamped JSON object per line
filters extended-only items unless extended persistence is requested
sanitizes extended command output before persistence
persists AgenC response_item.payload and event_msg.payload.msg rollout shapes
sanitizes AgenC event_msg.payload.msg.payload exec output before persistence
updates latest session metadata after each append and close
reopening an existing session file continues sequence numbers
edgeCases: closed recorders reject further appends
empty or absent rollout files read as an empty line set
existing empty rollout files reopen in append mode after startup interruption
unsafe session ids do not collide when created in the same timestamp
unsafe createdAt values cannot escape the sessions directory
corrupt JSONL surfaces parse failure
valid JSON with invalid rollout-line shape is rejected before resume

requiredBehaviors: session index is append-only JSONL
latest row for a session id wins
tombstones hide deleted session files
listing can repair missing index rows by scanning session files
edgeCases: invalid index rows are ignored
dashed session ids survive filename parsing during repair

requiredBehaviors: newest sessions are kept first
max session count removes older sessions
removed session files are deleted
removed trace bundle directories are deleted when linked from session metadata
deleted sessions are recorded as tombstones
edgeCases: the newest session is kept even if it alone exceeds the byte cap
deleted rows are not considered for future retention planning
index paths outside the rollout root are not deleted

requiredBehaviors: trace bundles contain a manifest
trace events append as JSONL
large debug payloads can be written as referenced payload files
trace events replay into a reduced state with sessions, turns, tool calls, inference calls, and raw payload refs
inference request/response payload refs reduce conversation items and link them to inference calls
replay preserves code cells, terminal runtime operations, compaction requests/checkpoints, protocol events, conversation items, and interaction edges
reduced state can be cached next to the raw bundle as state.json
snake_case persisted trace fields replay correctly
existing AgenC TraceWriter manifest and raw event envelopes replay correctly
edgeCases: reading a trace with no event log returns an empty event list
empty trace replay preserves a running root session
caller-provided trace ids cannot escape the trace root
replay fails on missing event logs, sequence gaps, manifest path escapes, payload path escapes, and missing payload files
raw trace envelopes with wall-clock time and envelope context normalize before replay
wire-defined raw turn context fields normalize into AgenC turn ownership
structured payload kind objects are preserved as normalized raw payload kind strings
snake_case manifests can choose event log and payload directory names
missing manifest identity/timestamp fields, unsupported schema versions, identity mismatches, and malformed raw event envelopes fail replay
duplicate starts, unknown end events, and mismatched turn owners fail replay
